name: Dough, Playtime for Kids
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and forms dough. This should take about 6 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and transfer to waxed paper.
4. Allow to cool enough to handle.
5. Knead the dough to form a pliable mass.
6. Store in a covered container or plastic bag.
7. Food coloring may be added to make different colors.
Makes approximately 2 pounds of playtime dough
